title: Physically smoke-test T-Deck ST7789 display validation
description: Run the display-enabled T-Deck gateway image on physical LilyGO T-Deck hardware and capture visual smoke evidence for ST7789 orientation, colors, backlight control, and shared SPI behavior. This is the physical validation split from project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.17 after the no-hardware DTS/Kconfig/build validation completed on EC2.
acceptance_criteria: Flash or otherwise run the display-enabled gateway image on a LilyGO T-Deck; capture boot logs; confirm backlight turns on/off as expected; confirm orientation, dimensions, color order, and offsets visually; confirm LoRa and SD chip-select behavior remain non-conflicting during boot/display init; record board revision and any panel differences.
notes:
Blocked on physical T-Deck hardware/display access. No hardware was available in this no-hardware session; EC2 validation covered devicetree, Kconfig, and build only.
Blocked 2026-07-02: requires physical LilyGO T-Deck hardware/display access. No physical board, panel, backlight, LoRa radio, SD card, or USB flashing path was available in this no-hardware session. Parent project-LICHEN-h7t5.7.17 completed EC2 no-hardware DTS/Kconfig/build validation only; visual orientation/colors/backlight and real shared-SPI behavior remain unvalidated.
